g.title: cluster_arduino
g.text: Twist ↔ serial bridge to the mecanum base; publishes wheel odometry.

g.title: cluster_vision
g.text: Camera capture, YOLO inference, object selection, and bbox→XYZ mapping.

g.title: cluster_wskr
g.text: Floor masking, whisker ranges, heading fusion, and the autopilot/approach pipeline.

g.title: cluster_xarm
g.text: Single-owner xArm hardware node, GA-planned grasp pipeline, and Q-learning wrist policy.

g.title: cluster_sysmgr
g.text: FSM supervisor and search behavior — student-implemented in this project.

g.title: cluster_util
g.text: Foxglove WebSocket bridge, telemetry shims, and tuning GUIs.

g.title: n_arduino
g.text: Converts cmd_vel into Arduino V/X serial

g.title: n_dr
g.text: Fuses the latest visual heading with

g.title: n_cam
g.text: Pulls JPEG frames from the USB webcam
via GStreamer and republishes them as

g.title: n_yolo
g.text: Runs YOLO + ByteTrack on every camera

g.title: n_floor
g.text: Builds a binary floor mask from the
camera frame for use by whisker rays.

g.title: n_sel
g.text: Picks the best detection from the latest
YOLO frame using a class-priority list.

g.title: n_search
g.text: while watching for toys / ArUco IDs.

g.title: n_state
g.text: FSM that drives one full collection

g.title: n_range
g.text: the floor mask and the tracked bbox to

g.title: n_auto
g.text: MLP that turns whisker fan + heading

g.title: n_hw
g.text: Sole owner of the xArm USB device;
exposes every controller method as a

g.title: n_q
g.text: Looks up the best wrist angle for a
given aspect ratio from a CSV policy.

g.title: n_fxbridge
g.text: services to Foxglove Studio over a

g.title: n_apprbr
g.text: Wraps the WSKR/XArm actions as plain

g.title: n_webhelp
g.text: Publishes one latched listing of the
autopilot model files available on disk.
